idea-plugin.name: LMDB Viewer
idea-plugin.description:
LMDB Viewer

Browse LMDB (Lightning Memory-Mapped Database) data stores directly inside the IDE.

  • Open an LMDB environment (a directory or a single *.mdb file); read-only by default and safe.
  • Explore named sub-databases (DBIs) and their entries with lazy paging for huge stores.
  • Decode opaque byte keys/values: hex dump, UTF-8/ASCII text, auto-detected JSON, CBOR (rendered as JSON), integers.
  • Pluggable decoders via an extension point for binary formats (protobuf, msgpack, ...).
  • Search by key prefix and inspect DUPSORT multi-value keys.
  • Optional edit mode: opt in per environment to add, edit, or delete entries (with confirmation).
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 0.14.0 — Export / import: export a database or the whole environment to JSON, NDJSON, or CSV (right-click in the tree), and import JSON/NDJSON back into a database in edit mode. Binary keys/values round-trip losslessly.
  • 0.13.0 — New CBOR decoder: binary CBOR (RFC 8949) values are rendered as human-readable JSON (auto-detected). The decoder "Auto" option now shows the detected type, and the toolbar / read-edit mode toggle were polished.
  • 0.10.0 — Edits grow the environment's map size automatically on MDB_MAP_FULL (with a warning).
  • 0.9.0 — Optional edit mode: add / edit value / delete entries behind an explicit per-environment toggle.

action.description: Open an LMDB environment in the LMDB Viewer tool window
